text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Whew. I managed to come in first place.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but this win is nothing special. It's merely the
natural consequence of our daily efforts.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Our training must continue, and we should not
grow complacent.
choice_data_list: Even so, I'm glad you won!
Even so, I'm glad you won!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Our training must continue, and we should not
grow complacent.
choice_data_list: Even so, I'm glad you won!
Even so, I'm glad you won!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you. I didn't think you'd be this
excited, though.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However, this is only one stop on the way to the
top. So please—continue on this journey with me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. One must wear one's helm most firmly in the
moment of victory, as the saying goes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So please remain vigilant as you guide me
forward. ♪
